chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – The names and the teknonyms

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/35)
text: أَرَادَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) الرُّكُوبَ إِلَى بَعْضِ شِيعَتِهِ لِيَعُودَهُ فَقَالَ يَا جَابِرُ الْحَقْنِي فَتَبِعْتُهُ فَلَمَّا انْتَهَى إِلَى بَابِ الدَّارِ خَرَجَ عَلَيْنَا ابْنٌ لَهُ صَغِيرٌ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَا اسْمُكَ قَالَ مُحَمَّدٌ قَالَ فَبِمَا تُكَنَّى قَالَ بِعَلِيٍّ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَقَدِ احْتَظَرْتَ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ احْتِظَاراً شَدِيداً إِنَّ الشَّيْطَانَ إِذَا سَمِعَ مُنَادِياً يُنَادِي يَا مُحَمَّدُ يَا عَلِيُّ ذَابَ كَمَا يَذُوبُ الرَّصَاصُ حَتَّى إِذَا سَمِعَ مُنَادِياً يُنَادِي بِاسْمِ عَدُوٍّ مِنْ أَعْدَائِنَا اهْتَزَّ وَ اخْتَالَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Muslim, from Al Husayn Bin Nasr, from his father, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> wanted to ride over to one of his<sup>asws</sup> Shias to bid him farewell, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Jabir! Accompany me’. So I followed him<sup>asws</sup>. So when he<sup>asws</sup> ended up to the door of the house, there came out to us a young boy. So Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘What is your name?’ He said, ‘Muhammad’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘In what have you been teknonymed?’ So he said, ‘With Ali’. So Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘You have agonised the Satan<sup>la</sup> with an intense agony. When the Satan<sup>la</sup> hears a caller calling out, ‘O Muhammad! O Ali!’, he<sup>la</sup> melts just like the melting of the lead, until when he<sup>la</sup> hears a caller calling out with a name of an enemy from our<sup>asws</sup> enemies, he<sup>la</sup> swings and struts’.
en.sarwar: 12. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Muslim from al-Husayn ibn Nasr from his father from ‘Amr ibn Shamir from Jabir who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once wanted to visit one of his followers because he was ill. He (the Imam) told me to follow him and I followed him (the Imam). When he (the Imam) arrived at his door his small son came out and abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asked, ‘What is your name?’ He replied, ‘It is Muhammad.’ He (the Imam) asked, ‘What is your Kunyah ?’ He replied, ‘It is Ali.’ Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, then said, ‘You have fortified yourself against Satan very intensely. When Satan hears someone calling O Muhammad, O Ali, Satan melts like lead until he hears someone calling with the names of our enemies; he becomes excited and swaggers.’”
